candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows a directional signal (SHORT/LONG) with green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, the signal has no historical analog and must be sized down or vetoed regardless of conviction percentage.
testable_rule: if consensus_dir in ('SHORT','LONG') and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr < 0.50: size_multiplier *= 0.0  # veto. elif green_matches == 0 and hist_hr >= 0.55: size_multiplier *= 0.75  # novel config but historical edge holds
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
